continuation:
That's 7 branches plus the current `fix/data-fetcher-scheduler`. Shipping all of them means pushing each, creating a PR, and merging. Let me confirm before I proceed — this will push and create PRs for all 8 branches, then merge them via `gh pr merge`. Is that correct?

Also, some of these look like they may have been superseded by the main-branch changes (e.g. `feat/auto-merge-hardening`, `feat/auto-merge-system` were part of the auto-merge system we just cleaned up). Want me to skip those and
